title: Heimgewebe resilience architecture
goal: Implement the ten validated ecosystem-derived resilience mechanisms across the existing Heimgewebe truth owners without creating a new control plane, status truth or autonomous authority.
completion: Stable systems and relevant relations declare criticality, failure domains, coupling, failure policy and reviewed recovery semantics without storing live status in Systemkatalog.
Temporary operational resources have owner, terminal condition, retention, orphan detection and evidence-preserving cleanup behavior.
Bureau and Grabowski prevent unsafe parallel work across shared critical failure domains while retaining proven disjoint parallelism.
Foundational functions have explicit primary and recovery paths, common-mode risk classification and successful bounded recovery evidence.
Konvergenzregelkreis requires lifecycle, degraded-mode, recovery and split-brain evidence according to risk and target criticality.
Slow deterioration is observed through source-bound snapshots without a synthetic global health score or automatic task authority.
Declarative failover uses only predeclared, verified paths with bounded degradation, return conditions and no authority transfer.
Schauwerk renders the resilience model without becoming a truth owner, and Vibe-Lab evaluates measured benefit against operational cost.

does_not_establish: permission to mutate foreign dirty worktrees
completion before PR, merge, deployment and live evidence
